mapper.select:
SELECT C.ID, C.CT_NO, C.CT_REV, C.CT_TITLE, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, C.TOT_AMT, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REG_ID FROM CT_CONTRACT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='CT_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.DEL_YN='N'
AND (C.CT_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.CT_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND C.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY C.ID DESC

SELECT C.ID, C.COMP_CD, C.CT_NO, C.CT_REV, C.CT_TITLE, C.CT_TYP, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, C.PURC_GRP_CD, C.CHRG_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, C.CURR_CD, C.SUPL_AMT, C.VAT_AMT, C.TOT_AMT, C.SRC_TYP, C.SRC_ID, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REMARK, C.REG_ID FROM CT_CONTRACT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='CT_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.ID=#{id} AND C.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, CT_PRC, TO_CHAR(APPLY_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_SD, TO_CHAR(APPLY_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_ED, MIN_QTY, MAX_QTY, REMARK FROM CT_CONTRACT_ITEM WHERE CONTRACT_ID=#{contractId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_CONTRACT (COMP_CD, CT_NO, CT_REV, CT_TITLE, CT_TYP, VD_CD, VD_NM, PURC_GRP_CD, CHRG_USR_ID, VALID_SD, VALID_ED, CURR_CD, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, TOT_AMT, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{ctNo}, NVL(#{ctRev},0), #{ctTitle}, NVL(#{ctTyp},'PRICE'), #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{purcGrpCd}, #{chrgUsrId}, TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{currCd},'KRW'), NVL(#{suplAmt},0), NVL(#{vatAmt},0), NVL(#{totAmt},0), #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CT_CONTRACT SET CT_TITLE=#{ctTitle}, VD_CD=#{vdCd}, VD_NM=#{vdNm}, PURC_GRP_CD=#{purcGrpCd}, VALID_SD=TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), VALID_ED=TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), CURR_CD=#{currCd}, SUPL_AMT=#{suplAmt}, VAT_AMT=#{vatAmt}, TOT_AMT=#{totAmt}, REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CT_CONTRACT SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE CT_CONTRACT SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_CONTRACT_ITEM (CONTRACT_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, CT_PRC, APPLY_SD, APPLY_ED, MIN_QTY, MAX_QTY, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{contractId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{ctPrc},0), TO_DATE(#{applySd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{applyEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{minQty},0), NVL(#{maxQty},0), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT I.ID, I.CONTRACT_ID, I.ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM, I.UNIT_CD, I.CT_PRC, TO_CHAR(I.APPLY_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_SD, TO_CHAR(I.APPLY_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS APPLY_ED FROM CT_CONTRACT_ITEM I JOIN CT_CONTRACT C ON C.ID = I.CONTRACT_ID AND C.DEL_YN='N' AND C.STS='ACTIVE' WHERE C.VD_CD = #{vdCd} AND I.ITEM_CD = #{itemCd} AND TO_DATE(#{ymd},'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN I.APPLY_SD AND I.APPLY_ED ORDER BY I.APPLY_SD DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
